touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Aiden Turner at CrimsonPrism. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant's onboarding automation capabilities for marketing agencies.
Second cold call attempt to Aiden Turner. Reached voicemail again, left brief follow-up message referencing previous call.
Sent cold email to Aiden Turner highlighting how AskElephant helps mid-market agencies automate customer onboarding and reduce RevOps overhead. No response received.
Third cold call attempt to Aiden Turner. No answer, left voicemail mentioning email sent and offering to discuss onboarding challenges.
Brief connection call with Aiden Turner. He confirmed receiving messages and expressed initial interest in learning more about onboarding automation. Scheduled discovery call for next week.

questions_asked.question: What prompted you to take my call today?
questions_asked.answer: We've been looking at ways to streamline our client onboarding process, and your email mentioned automation which caught my attention.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week
Send calendar invite and prep materials

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Aiden Turner with brief message referencing upcoming discovery call. No response required.

Discovery call with Aiden Turner to understand CrimsonPrism's onboarding challenges. He described manual processes causing delays and inconsistent client experiences. Currently using spreadsheets and email templates. Team of 555 needs better coordination. Interested in automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current onboarding process from signed deal to fully activated client.
questions_asked.answer: It's mostly manual - we have templates in email, a few spreadsheets to track tasks, and a lot of Slack pinging. Takes us about 3-4 weeks and clients often ask where things stand.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for you in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Cut onboarding time in half, give clients visibility into their progress, and free up my team to focus on higher-value work instead of chasing updates.

questions_asked.question: How does AskElephant integrate with our existing CRM and project management tools?
questions_asked.answer: We have native integrations with most major CRMs and can connect via API to custom tools. I'd want to see your specific tech stack to map out the integration approach.

next_steps: Aiden to share current tech stack and tools
Rep to prepare integration overview
Schedule qualification call to assess fit

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Aiden Turner. Confirmed budget authority for tools under $10K, timeline to implement before Q3, and decision process involves IT Director Rosa Adeyemi for technical review. Discussed 11 seats needed for RevOps and customer success teams.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget range for an onboarding automation solution?
questions_asked.answer: I have authority up to about $10K annually for tools like this. Anything above needs exec approval which adds time.

questions_asked.question: What does implementation typically look like and how long does it take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-4 weeks depending on integration complexity. We provide dedicated onboarding support and your team would be live before Q3.

next_steps: Aiden to loop in Rosa Adeyemi for technical evaluation
Schedule deeper discovery call
Prepare demo tailored to onboarding use case

touches.ai_summary: Detailed discovery call with Aiden Turner diving into specific workflows and pain points. Discussed current 3-4 week onboarding cycle, client drop-off during delays, and team capacity constraints. Aiden mentioned they're also evaluating Clari but looking for stronger automation focus. Agreed on demo next week.

questions_asked.question: You mentioned you're looking at other tools - what are you comparing us against?
questions_asked.answer: We've had demos with Clari. They're strong on revenue intelligence but we need something more focused on the actual workflow automation side of onboarding.

questions_asked.question: What happens if you don't solve this in the next quarter?
questions_asked.answer: We keep bleeding time on manual work, clients stay frustrated, and my team burns out. We're growing and this doesn't scale.

questions_asked.question: Can you show me real examples of agencies using this for client onboarding?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - I'll include 2-3 case studies in the demo prep and we can walk through workflows similar to yours.

objections: Want to make sure this is purpose-built for onboarding workflows, not just general automation
next_steps: Schedule demo for next week
Send agency-specific case studies
Prepare workflow automation examples

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Aiden Turner after discovery call with attached case studies and demo calendar invite. Aiden responded confirming demo time and asking if Rosa Adeyemi should attend. Rep confirmed yes and cc'd Rosa on the thread.

questions_asked.question: Should I have Rosa join the demo since she'll need to sign off on technical fit?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, definitely include her - we'll cover integrations and security requirements which will be relevant for her review.

next_steps: Rosa Adeyemi added to demo invite
Prepare technical FAQ for Rosa

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled proposal call with Aiden Turner was rescheduled by prospect. Aiden sent message that Rosa had a conflict and asked to move to later in the week. Rep accommodated and sent new invite.
next_steps: Rescheduled proposal call
Confirmed Rosa's availability

touches.ai_summary: Brief rescheduled proposal call with Aiden Turner. Rosa unable to join last minute due to IT emergency. Aiden asked for written proposal to review internally and share with Rosa. Rep agreed to send detailed proposal with pricing options.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over the proposal in writing so I can review with Rosa offline?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll send a comprehensive proposal today with pricing tiers and implementation timeline. Let's schedule a follow-up once you've both reviewed.

next_steps: Send written proposal with pricing options
Schedule follow-up negotiation call
Aiden to review with Rosa Adeyemi

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Aiden Turner to discuss proposal. He expressed strong interest but noted the $11,200 list price was above his $10K budget ceiling. Asked about discounting options and what flexibility exists. Also mentioned Clari came in lower. Discussed value differentiation and agreed to explore pricing that fits his budget.

questions_asked.question: What's the best pricing you can do for 11 seats? We're at $10K budget and Clari's quote was under that.
questions_asked.answer: Let me work with my manager on what we can do. Given your timeline and fit, I think we can find something that works within your budget. Can you share what specific number Clari quoted?

questions_asked.question: If we can meet your budget, what's your timeline to move forward?
questions_asked.answer: We'd want to start implementation within two weeks. I have buy-in from my team and Rosa is comfortable with the technical requirements.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the consulting hours included, or can we start with fewer seats?
questions_asked.answer: We could reduce seats but you mentioned needing 11 for full team coverage. The consulting hours are part of the package to ensure successful implementation. Let me see what pricing adjustment we can make.

objections: Price is above budget ceiling of $10K
next_steps: Rep to get approval for discount to meet $10K budget
Aiden to confirm Clari is still in consideration
Schedule pricing call to present final offer

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Aiden Turner to present revised proposal at $8,000 ACV (29% discount) to fit within budget. Aiden appreciative of the flexibility and confirmed this makes the business case work. Discussed contract terms and implementation kickoff timeline. He'll need a few days to get final internal sign-off but expressed strong intent to move forward.

questions_asked.question: At $8,000 annually, does this work within your budget and get us to a verbal yes?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this works. I appreciate you working with me on this. I need to loop Rosa in on the final contract language and get one more confirmation from finance, but we're good to move forward.

questions_asked.question: What's the contract term and what happens at renewal?
questions_asked.answer: This is a 12-month agreement. At renewal we'd revisit pricing based on standard rates, but you'd have a renewals account manager to discuss options at that time.

questions_asked.question: When can we target contract signature and implementation kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: I should have internal approvals by end of next week. Targeting signature within 10 days and kickoff the week after.

next_steps: Send final contract at $8K ACV
Aiden to get finance and Rosa final sign-off
Target contract signature within 10 days
Plan implementation kickoff
